# A309370 a(16) >= 505: Sidon set in {0,1}^16, integer componentwise addition.
# 505 vectors, one per line (bit position 0 first). beats OEIS recorded a(16)>=472 (+33).
# Independently re-verified: all C(505,2)+505 pairwise sums distinct.
